name: Dimension Theory
description: dim R = Krull dimension. Height, depth. dim R[x]=dim R+1. Regular local ⇒ UFD.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Krull dim\nsup chain primes"]
    D2["Def: Height ht P\nchain to P"]
    D3["Def: Depth\ndepth on modules"]
    D4["Def: Regular local\nk=dim R"]
    T1["Thm: dim Rₚ = ht P"]
    T2["Thm: dim R[x]=dim R+1"]
    T3["Thm: dim ≤ tr deg\nfield ext"]
    T4["Thm: Regular ⇒ CM"]
    T5["Thm: Regular local ⇒ UFD"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T1
    D1 --> T2
    D4 --> T4
    D4 --> T5
    T4 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
